confounds_excluded: session length was NOT fully separated from the schedule at short lengths — length is load-bearing (Exp 221)
negative_regions: short ~100t sessions (learning blocked, schedule does not rescue)
next_experiment_suggestions: attack the short-session LEARNING lever (lr / optimism / replay), NOT the precision schedule (which only optimizes exploitation)

outcome_regions.outcome: BLOCKED — learning fails; mean_csel near chance; schedule over-commits before learning (Exp 221)

thresholds.constant_response_ceiling: 1/3 (zero line; a constant policy maps 2/6 codes)
